contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: capoeira: calibrate moves + fix session generator for working 45-min sessions
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/capoeira/pull/7
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/111
  
  Details:
  Started mapping the 39 Bico Duro moves into working practice.html sessions.
  
  Audit of capoeira/data/moves.json after Phase 1A revealed three blockers
  for the session generator:
  
  1. duration_minutes was 20-25 (deep-practice time) so 4-6 moves = 80-150
     min vs the 45-min spec target.
  2. Tempo distribution was monolithic: all 10 Defense moves = Slow, all 26
     Attacks (except 1) = Medium → music tempo-arc generator was repetitive.
  3. pickTheme() could land on Foundation (1 move: Ginga) or Flow (2 moves)
     and then pickMoves() couldn't fill the 4-6 move target.
  
  Shipped in TrueSightDAO/capoeira#7:
  
  - Recalibrated duration_minutes 6-12 min per move based on complexity
    (Ginga 6 warm-up; Beginner Defense 6-8; Attack line-strikes 7-8; rolê
    variants 8-9; spinning attacks 9-10; Advanced 12; rolê-intro 3).
  - Recalibrated tempo_range across Slow/Medium/Fast by move character:
    Slow = grounded shapes, Medium = line-strike + close-range, Fast =
    spinning/rotational kicks. Final: Slow 11 / Medium 21 / Fast 7.
  - Populated pairs_well_with for every move: mirror pairs, attack↔defense,
    base↔rolê variants, spin family.
  - session-generator.js: pickTheme() filters to themes with >=MIN_MOVES.
  
  Headless simulation confirms sessions land at 30-55 min in Defense and
  Attacks themes with proper Slow→Medium→Medium→Slow music arcs.
  
  Two follow-ups queued in TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context#111:
  - Curriculum-based session mode (Ginga + Defense + Attacks per Bico Duro's
    actual spoken pedagogy) to un-skip Foundation/Flow.
  - Randomized tie-breaking in pickMoves() so identical difficulty bias
    doesn't produce byte-identical sessions.
  
  Live: https://capoeira.agroverse.shop/practice.html (GitHub Pages deploys
  on push to main, ~1-2 min after merge).
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
